item.title: Building Observability for the 99% developers (DockerCon 2022 notes)
item.description: From: https://docker.events.cube365.net/dockercon/2022/content/Videos/925dcd55-d2ee-4059-92c2-ea493bb7bfa9 Problems that this presentation tries to cover: “We tried to do testing but we can’t really know what happens until we run our system.

item.title: Creating a new user with SSH access in Linux
item.description: Create a user and give it a password that expires, so that they can change it when they login: 1 2 3 4 sudo useradd username passwd username # set password passwd -e username Make it a sudoer:
